title: Remove timer/time display from the app

requirements.text: Remove all timer and time-related UI elements from the game. This includes the countdown timer display, the duration selector toggle buttons (15/30/60/120s), and any time-remaining HUD panel. The game should no longer end based on a timer; instead it runs until all lives are lost (game over condition remains lives-based only).
acceptanceCriteria: No countdown timer is visible anywhere in the HUD during gameplay.
No duration selector (15/30/60/120s toggle buttons) is displayed on the start screen or in the HUD.
The game does not end when a timer reaches zero; the only game-over condition is losing all lives.
All timer-related state variables and logic are removed or disabled in App.tsx.
The HUD still displays Score, Streak Multiplier, Lives, WPM, and Difficulty Level without any time element.
WPM calculation continues to function correctly without a fixed-duration timer (e.g., elapsed time since first keystroke is used internally but not displayed).

constraints: Do not remove or alter the lives system, score/streak system, difficulty scaling, or falling-words mechanic.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
WPM must remain accurate using elapsed time since first keystroke internally, even though no timer is shown.
nonGoals: Adding any new game modes or features beyond removing the timer.
Changing the visual theme or neon aesthetic.
